description_long: This lantern features a bulbous, frosted glass enclosure encased in a black metal frame. The top and bottom sections are capped with solid, angular black metal, while the central glass body is gently faceted and semi-opaque, diffusing light softly. Two symmetrical, decorative metal wire arms extend outward and curl inward, adding an ornamental flourish to the design. A circular metal loop sits atop the lantern, likely serving as a hanging or mounting point. The overall aesthetic is both functional and decorative, suitable for urban streetscapes or park pathways. The construction suggests durability and weather resistance, with a classic yet slightly ornate appearance.
description: A black metal lantern with a frosted glass globe and decorative curled wire arms, topped with a circular hanging loop. The design is both functional and ornamental, ideal for urban outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the frosted glass globe, black metal caps, and prominent curled wire arms extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the lantern's rounded glass body and the vertical alignment of the metal frame, with the curled arms less visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, again showing the curled wire arms and the circular hanging loop.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, focusing on the lantern's profile and the vertical metal supports.
